    • originatingInstitution

      public IctWithdrawalTravelRule.Builder originatingInstitution(IctWithdrawalOriginatingInstitution originatingInstitution)
      The name and account id of institution sourcing the funds. Always 'Apex Clearing' and investor account id for ICT withdrawals;

      public IctWithdrawalTravelRule.Builder originatingInstitution(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends IctWithdrawalOriginatingInstitution> originatingInstitution)
      The name and account id of institution sourcing the funds. Always 'Apex Clearing' and investor account id for ICT withdrawals;
